info.title: Rhino Asset Public API
info.description: Public Rhino Asset HTTP API. Internal routes are excluded from this spec. Outbound webhooks are documented under **Webhooks** (`partyReady`): Rhino POSTs to your URL when onboarding is approved with a party.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Outbound events Rhino delivers to partner HTTPS endpoints.

Lightweight liveness probe returning service availability for load balancers and monitors.

post.description: After an internal onboarding decision with `decision=APPROVED` and a `party_id`, Rhino POSTs this JSON body to the HTTPS URL stored via `PUT /public/onboarding-sessions/{sessionId}/webhook` (`partner_ready_webhook_url`). Payload mirrors the party resource you would read with `GET /public/onboarding-sessions/{sessionId}/party`. If `partner_ready_webhook_secret` is set, Rhino sends `X-Rhino-Signature: sha256=<hex>` (HMAC-SHA256 of the raw JSON body).
